topic.title: Updated TA office hours schedule
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Based on recent attendance, I'm updating my TA office hours to better align with times that work for more of you:

Wednesdays & Fridays | 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM EST (11:00 AM - 1:00 PM PST)

I want to make sure I'm available when you need help most, so I hope this new schedule is more convenient. Feel free to stop by with any questions about assignments, course material, or anything else!

If this time doesn't work for you, reach out to me on teams and we can figure something out.

 

Regards
Arundhati Bandopadhyaya
Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
